action.reasoning: Observation: 0.0167 success rate after multiple evals. predict.py has been truncated at _action_to_ee for many iterations - the action bridge was never complete in any submission. Training crashed with attention mask size mismatch (867 vs 819) - this is likely because dataset returns task=[instruction] which gets double-nested by DataLoader collation. Analysis: The two critical fixes are: (1) Dataset should return task=instruction (string, not list) so DataLoader creates batch['task']=[instruction] not [[instruction]], fixing the attention mask issue. (2) Write COMPLETE predict.py with full _action_to_ee method. Also need more training epochs (current 2 is insufficient). Decision: Write complete predict.py and train.py with these fixes, run 4-epoch training, then submit eval in next iteration.
